overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic waterfront promenade in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) during golden hour sunset. The camera moves from a covered commercial area with neon signs toward the ocean, then along the waterfront railing with views of the setting sun, and finally along the open promenade with food vendors and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping promenade with restaurants

events.description: first view of waterfront and ocean becomes visible between buildings ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the pedestrian promenade toward the waterfront

entered.detail: commercial building with red neon Japanese signage at street level
modern concrete seating with integrated warm lighting
multi-story building with reflective glass facade and trees in front
tall palm trees lining the center of the walkway
large rectangular planters with blue neon accent lighting at the base

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian promenade with the Fuyutsuki restaurant on the right and modern glass buildings on the left. The walkway features concrete benches and illuminated planters as the camera moves toward the waterfront visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront observation deck at sunset

events.description: exits the covered promenade into open waterfront area with direct view of the ocean
moving into direct sunlight as the camera faces the setting sun over the water

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront railing with the setting sun directly ahead over the water

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the water's edge
calm ocean water reflecting the golden sunset
bright sun low on the horizon creating strong lens flare
digital kiosk with illuminated advertisements and anime-style graphics

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered promenade into an open waterfront area with full view of the ocean and the setting sun directly ahead. The camera approaches the metal railing at the water's edge as the lighting shifts to direct golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow waterfront walkway between building and ocean

events.description: turning right to follow the curve of the waterfront path along the building
passing floating debris and objects in the water near the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge with the building wall on the right and open ocean on the left

entered.detail: industrial platforms and dock structures floating in the water in the distance
close-up view of building exterior with balconies and vertical windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow waterfront path with the building facade immediately on the right and the ocean on the left. The sun is now to the right side as the path curves, revealing industrial floating platforms in the distance and debris floating near the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with food vendors and seating

events.description: turning back toward the promenade plaza area with food vendors and benches
turning left to walk along the main promenade facing the commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: turning and walking along the wide promenade past food kiosks and benches with the ocean now to the right

entered.detail: colorful food stand with illuminated menu panels and anime-style character graphics
building with large illuminated billboard displaying a figure and MAKO signage
empty benches facing the water for spectators

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the water's edge back into the wider promenade plaza, passing a colorful food vendor kiosk and the Mako building with its large digital billboard. The camera continues along the waterfront path with benches and palm trees as the sun remains low on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered commercial walkway into a wide, sun-drenched waterfront plaza during the golden hour. It begins by gliding through a covered pedestrian promenade flanked by the Fuyutsuki restaurant and modern glass buildings, moving past concrete benches toward the distant coast. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a bright waterfront area where the lighting shifts to direct golden sunlight over the ocean. The path then narrows along a metal railing, curving past floating industrial platforms and debris before turning away from the water's edge. Finally, the view expands back into the wider promenade plaza, passing a colorful food vendor and the Mako building's digital billboard among palm trees under a low-hanging sun.
